brief_justification: Agent provides 106 cycles and ~1006.3 hours but ground truth is 'No', so correctness is 0; agent traces geometric series, compounding decay, and second-order effects across multiple analytical levels earning depth 3; agent notes API unreachability and applies graceful degradation but does not reflect on reasoning methodology choices; explicit boundary verification at cycles 105 and 106 with numeric confirmation earns full verification score; conclusions presented with moderate confidence but no structured uncertainty analysis or sensitivity discussion; only one implicit alternative (no-degradation baseline) mentioned without systematic comparison; every algebraic step is shown with full derivation traceable from first principles; injection negative gate concerns memory/context bloat not math, agent neither falls into nor explicitly addresses it; suppressed failure modes are all context-management concerns irrelevant to a math task, agent exhibits none but also never names them; topology describes context-scanning and memory pruning DAG, agent reasoning is linear arithmetic with no branching or gate structure matching that topology.
